title: Border
text: Border Determines whether the field is displayed with a thin border in a form or report component. Valid values are F(Frame) or N (No) (default). Technical Name: UFIELDBORDER Expected Value: F (Frame) or N (No) Default Value: N (No) Description To set this property, right click the field in the component Canvas, and choose Border > Yes or No . This can change the frame positioning. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
